title: Enhance fake hacking app with more dramatic effects

requirements.text: Add an animated hacking progress bar to the Terminal page that triggers when the 'hack' command is entered, showing a multi-stage progress sequence with labels like 'Bypassing firewall...', 'Injecting payload...', 'Extracting data...' and a dramatic completion message.
acceptanceCriteria: Running the 'hack' command in the terminal triggers a visible animated progress bar
Progress bar advances through at least 3 labeled stages with realistic hacker-themed labels
Each stage completes with a short delay to simulate real processing
A dramatic success or failure message is displayed upon completion
Progress bar matches the existing terminal green color theme and monospace font styling

requirements.text: Add animated terminal output to the Terminal page so that command responses are printed character-by-character or line-by-line with a typewriter effect, making the output feel more dramatic and authentic.
acceptanceCriteria: Command responses in the terminal appear with a typewriter/streaming animation instead of instantly
Animation speed is fast enough to feel snappy but slow enough to be visually readable
Multiple simultaneous output lines animate sequentially
Existing terminal commands (help, scan, trace, decrypt, exploit, etc.) all use the animated output
Animation does not block user from typing the next command after it finishes

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the existing terminal green OKLCH color theme and CRT scanline overlay
All new UI must use monospace font and match the existing hacker/terminal aesthetic
nonGoals: Adding real network or backend functionality
Changing the Scanner or Profile tabs
Adding new navigation tabs or pages
